title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen Release notes link
scenario: Release Notes links on DFU screen do not open the correct web pages for Osprey EB and CC devices
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the Update button (or navigate to the DFU screen via Home → Update).
3. On the DFU screen, locate the release notes link for the available update.
5. Verify that the correct web page (Poly support page for the specific device/firmware) opens in the default browser.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to Settings → [Device Name] → Device Firmware Update (or Settings → DFU).
8. On the DFU screen from Settings, locate the release notes link for the available update.
10. Verify that the correct web page (Poly support page for the specific device/firmware) opens in the default browser.
11. Repeat steps 1–10 for Osprey EB device (firmware ≥ 5039).
12. Repeat steps 1–10 for Osprey CC device (firmware ≥ 5039).
expected: Tapping the release notes link on the DFU screen (from both Home screen and Settings screen) opens the correct Poly support web page for the device and firmware version.
